summary: Happy path: confirm intro, push past health issues, take the first setup option, skip MCP + Slack, delete installed skills.

path.auto: dismiss outage — proceed even if the readiness probe flags an issue
pick the first option — only appears when the framework needs disambiguation (e.g. Next.js router); Node/Express has none
(external) — the real agent integrates the SDK + instruments events
skip — don't install the MCP server
delete — leave nothing behind (terminal: the run's done-signal)
